headline: T. ROWE PRICE IS SHAPING RETIREMENT THROUGH COLLABORATION, RESEARCH, AND INNOVATION
summary: T. Rowe Price, a global asset management firm and a leader in retirement, today announced that it is expanding the leadership team responsible for delivering world class global retirement capabilities. The expanded team now includes Jessica Sclafani, CAIA©, who will become head of the Retirement Strategist team; Richard Parkin, who recently joined T. Rowe Price as the head of UK Retirement; and Scott Keller, head of Americas, APAC, and EMEA Distribution, who will take on an expanded remit to inc
